name: brandketing
description: Build marketing briefs and copy from a local context store.

interface.shortDescription: Turn raw product and customer inputs into briefs and copy from a local context store
interface.longDescription: Brandketing ingests product, customer, market, and proof inputs into structured local objects, lets a human review them, then compiles approved data into marketing briefs and copy with a strategist and critic pass. Runtime data stays under `.brandketing/` inside the target project and the plugin does not require external services.
defaultPrompt: Ingest these customer notes into the brandketing store
Compile a homepage brief from approved brandketing data
Generate landing page copy for this ICP and critique it
